feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sales Organizational Structure - Ad Service Industry
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question about the Sales Organizational Structure for Service industry.

Customer is an Ad service company who reach customers via Instagram, Facebook. Also, they say have 500+ dispensaries. They couldn't understand the SAP terms how more specific we explain.

Could somebody give examples how this Sales Organizational Structure works for a Ad service company?

How to explain them to make this understand.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks!

entry.title: Moving a part of existing "On-Premise ECC" to "SAP S/4 HANA Cloud"
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a Production ECC System which is on EHP7 Non-Unicode.

It has 2 Production Work Clients - Clients A and B.

Client-A of it is being used for HR and GCS. 

Client-B is being used for Plant Maintenance, Finance and Quality Mgmt.

We are looking on the Option to move a part of one of the "Client-A only i.e. GCS to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud" whereas others will still be on On-Premise itself.

Please help with the possible Options/approaches in moving with this scenario from On-Premise ECC to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud without disturbing the others.

Thanks.

Regards,

Gowtham

entry.title: SAP_Condition Contract_Spreading fixed amount accrual according to the number of days
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

i have an yearly fixed amount to be accrued on a monthly base proportionally to the number of days of each month. So, considering for instance 1.200€ yearly, i don't have to post 100 € each month but according to the number of days of each month; below an example.

Yearly bonus: 1.200 €

Delta accrual on 31.01 = (1.200/365)*31 --> 101,92 €

Delta accrual on 28.02 = (1.200/365)*28 --> 92,05 €

Delta accrual on 31.03 = (1.200/365)*31 --> 101,92 €

Delta accrual on 30.04 = (1.200/365)*30 --> 98,63 €

etc...

Do you know how i can manage it?

Thanks and regards

Pier Paolo

entry.title: How to enter project budget with active UPA
entry.content: In our system UPA is active and we wnt to enter a project budget with CJ30. This is not possible as we receive the error "Function not possible as UPA is active". so now we need a new solution to enter the projects budget. We know that we can use the financial data import as a work around, but there should be an app to maintain the budget manually.

entry.title: Exclude Agent Purchase requisition Flexible workflow
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a Flexible workflow for Purchase Requisition creation (Scenario WS02000458), and the Agent determination is done by BADI MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2. The agent determination works fine, but we want to Exclude the Requestor from the Approval step. Already tried the 'Exclude Restricted Agents' in the Step properties of the flexible workflow by selecting the option 'Exclude Requestor', but the requestor still gets the work item for approval. Is there a BADI to determine Agents for Exclusion ?

Thanks,

Smitha

entry.title: SAP Master Data Integration issue for Subscription Billing with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using the Subscription Billing solution with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system.

When I try to utilize the function of test connection to make the replication is active from Sub Bill system to SAP S/4 we are encountering a 404 HTTP error and I'm attaching a screenshot below for the same.

If anyone has any expertise on how to fix this or come across same situation, please throw some lights.

SAP S/4HANA SAP Subscription Billing SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management 

Thanks!

entry.title: Recommended approach for Fiori Adapt UI in S/4H On-Premise system (Customizing client) with no data
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For a client's S/4HANA greenfield implementation with Private Cloud (RISE with SAP), there are two clients in the Development system i.e. Customizing client (400) and Test Client (410). The client has decided not to allow any (test) data creation in client 400 but only in test client 410 (this approach seems standard in many projects).

To implement Fiori Adapt-UI enhancements and test Key-User Extensibility, we need those UI screens where we want to implement changes. For example, to change something on a Product (detail) screen, we need to navigate from the Products list in the Manage Product Master Data Fiori app. But without any data, this navigation is not possible.

The question is, what is the best or recommended to work on such Enhancements? Should we allow such Enhancements in the Test client which means also the possibility of creating a Transport Request where such enhancements could be locked for further systems?

Had anyone been in a similar system environment and what kind of approach was used there?

SAP Fiori Launchpad SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud @Jocelyn_Dart @MioYasutake

entry.title: What is the difference between OMS and OMM, while using SAP Commerce with S/4 Hana which to use?
entry.content:
We are planning to integrate SAP Commerce Cloud with S/4 Hana Public Cloud, as part of this we need to integrate the Order notifications. 

When I went through the documentation we need to use hooks for notifications but I see oms and omm hooks for e.g : sapCpiOmmOrderConfirmationPersistenceHook and sapCpiOmsOrderConfirmationPersistenceHook, I am bit confused on which one to use in iflow.

Thank you

entry.title: Accounting entries getting wrong at the time of sales return credit note
entry.content:
we are using ZRE order type for sales return and we are facing the accounting entries are getting Wrong.

At the time of sales return credit note the account entries should be

Revenue GL.. DR

Customer..  Cr

But we are getting reversed like

Customer.. Dr

Revenue GL ..Cr

Note: Our client have 15 Company codes and using same order type ZRE and we are facing only in 1 company code which is go for live and at the time of customer credit note it is working fine only facing at the time of sales Return credit note 

Kindly help us on this Issue

Thank you and Regards

entry.title: Services for object inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using the 'Services for object' box that is displayed in every document once activated using the PID SD_SWU_ACTIVE (including PRs in ME52N/ME353N, POs in ME22N/ME23N and Inbound deliveries in VL32N/VL33N, though the description of the PID is talking of workflow box activation in VA02 and VA03).

The 'Relationships' menu gives direct access to IDocs received or sent for the document.

That's easier and quicker than going to the outputs for the doc., copy the IDoc number in the processing log for an output and paste it then in WE02 to display it.

However, the relationships menu in the box remains empty for an inbound delivery, even if an output was processed fr it and an IDoc sent.

Anyone has an idea if I miss anything?

BR

Yan

entry.title: HR Ministamm in S/4 HANA notwendig
entry.content:
Guten Tag,

ich habe mal eine generelle Frage.
Braucht man im S/4 HANA einen Personal Ministamm, oder ist es nicht zwingend notwendig?

Vielen Dank.

entry.title: FPCOPARA - Error EZ488 Sender address does not contain any data for dispatch type EMAIL
entry.content:
Why is SAP checking company code (BUKRS) email address while generating correspondences?
Why is the system forcing to fetch the sender email address from company code email ID.
When the company code email is not maintained, the error EZ488 is thrown.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: FKKINVDOC_DISP: Select and display an archived invoice by alternative selection fields
entry.content:
It is not possible to select an archived invoicing document in transaction FKKINVDOC_DISP by using one of the fields:
 FIKEY - Reconciliation Key
 EXBEL - Official Document Number


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to remove attachment in "Managed Purchase Requsition" Apps in Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We have an issue where we have attached a document in purchase requisition via Managed Purchase Requisition Apps in Fiori. However, when we try to remove the document, system will indicate it has been deleted but when we go back to the said purchase requisition, the document is still there. Please advice what could be the cause for this.

Thanks.

entry.title: Work center hierarchy migration object does not exist in S/4HANA 2023 version
entry.content:
During the creation of the migration object with regards to the work center hierarchy, the object didn´t list into the migration cockpit.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Grouping Key not found in BP vendor company view (S4)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I can't find the grouping key in vendor company view via transaction code BP. I am using the standard role from SAP which is FI vendor. I want to group all the open items into a single payment document even they are different vendor codes in F110 payment run. That's why I want to use grouping key.

Below is the screen from BP vendor company view - FI vendor role

I try to adjust the account group layout, layout per company code and the field grouping per BP role.

But still not work. Anyone can help?

entry.title: Is it possible to group all open items into a single payment document?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I get the requirement from my users, they want to group all opened item into a single payment document via F110 automatic payment program. Even it include multiple vendor codes, they want to show one payment document only. So only one bank account will be credit. I can't find any setting or configuration in FBZP, most of them related to how to separate the payment into different clearing document.  

Debit: Vendor code

Credit: Bank account

 

Current testing result

entry.title: Third Party with Subcontracting PREQ from Schedule line doesnt generate component requirement
entry.content:
Material type: FIn goods (QTY/Value updating- X) 

When  Requirement class No MRP indicator is "1"  : MRP run doesnt recognize the third Party Preq generated from Sales order schedule line  "DS" with Account assignment category "X" and the components dependent requirements (Planned orders) are not generated and requisition is  displayed in MD04 with exception 20 cancel process and 26 Excess in segment ( No other requirement exist.

After this , If Requirement class "No MRP" is changed to Blank then duplicate Purchase req is created with account assignment "M" derived from the Requirement class apart from the one existing in Schedule line in the sales order. This PREQ however generates dependent requirement and planned order for component on MRP run.
I already checked multiple blogs including this one which matches to everything similar, but it doesnt talk about component requirements for the subcontracting and MRP explosion.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/third-party-subcontracting-process-overview-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13556558


Any help appreciated .

entry.title: How to get the certificate SAPSSLA.pse?
entry.content:
Dear SAP

When I run TCODE STC01,it happens  "@M4@ 2024.04.15 / 14:57:43    @5C\QError@    No certificate list found for >/usr/sap/S4D/D00/sec/SAPSSLA.pse<        @15@    2024.04.15    14:57:44    100028125"

How to solve it?

entry.title: Automatically bring the indictax to the ME51N
entry.content:
Hi,
I hope you are doing well.

Please if anyone know how to automatically bring the indictax from material master to the ME51N (creat purchase requisition).

Thanks a lot
